parameters.subject: Kalm - Partnership!
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Extract First Name').item.json.firstName }}!

I’m Kamila and I’m reaching out from Kalm! We’ve been following your content and genuinely love the energy you share because it aligns so naturally with the women we create for!

We’d love to gift you our best-selling  Mouth Tape! It has been helping thousands of women sleep deeper, reduce snoring, and wake up feeling hydrated and refreshed. There are absolutely no strings attached. We simply want to send you something we think you would enjoy and benefit from :) 

If you’re open to it, just share your shipping address and we’ll send it out right away!  

Here’s the product page if you want to take a look: https://clubkalm.com/collections/all/products/kalm-mouth-tape-refill

Talk soon, 

Team Kalm
